overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire exploring a rocky cliffside with a waterfall. The character walks along the canyon edge before turning inland into a grassy forested area on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff edge at waterfall overlook

events.description: character begins walking forward along the cliff edge after observing the waterfall

agents.ego_description: standing at the edge of a waterfall looking down into the misty canyon, then beginning to walk along the rocky ledge

entered.detail: large waterfall cascading down the rocky canyon wall with white water and mist
gray stone ledge where the character stands at the canyon rim
steep rocky canyon walls surrounding the waterfall
greenish river water flowing through the canyon below
white water spray rising from the base of the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the edge of a dramatic waterfall in a rocky canyon, looking down at the mist and rushing water below. After a moment of observation, the character begins walking along the narrow cliff edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon overlook trail with panoramic views

events.description: view opens from enclosed waterfall overlook to wide canyon vista with distant mountains

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow cliff path with the canyon and river visible below to the right

entered.detail: winding river visible in the canyon bottom stretching into the distance
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon under blue sky
scattered pine trees on the hillside to the left of the path
expansive view of the green valley and rolling hills beyond the canyon
patches of green grass beginning to appear on the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: As the character walks along the cliff path, the scene opens up to reveal a breathtaking canyon vista with a winding river below and distant mountains on the horizon. The waterfall disappears behind as the camera pans to show the expansive valley view.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside trail transitioning to grassy hillside

events.description: ground surface transitions from bare rock to grassy patches as the trail moves inland

agents.ego_description: continuing along the cliff trail with expansive views of the valley, moving toward more vegetated terrain

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the cliff edge with the valley sprawling below. The terrain gradually becomes grassier, and the cliff edge recedes to the right as the path widens into a grassy hillside with scattered pine trees.

events.description: character turns away from the cliff edge and moves inland into grassy forested terrain

agents.ego_description: walking away from the cliff edge into a grassy hillside surrounded by pine trees on a dirt path

entered.detail: large boulder formation on the left side of the grassy hill
narrow dirt trail winding through the grass and trees

segments.scene_description: The character turns inland away from the canyon, entering a grassy hillside dotted with pine trees. The cliff and valley disappear from view as the character follows a dirt path into the forested terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the dramatic edge of a rocky canyon waterfall into a serene, forested hillside. It begins with the character observing the mist and rushing water from a cliffside perch before they start walking along the narrow rocky edge. As the character advances, the waterfall recedes and the view expands into a breathtaking canyon vista featuring a winding river and distant mountains. The terrain then gradually shifts from jagged rock to a grassy hillside with scattered pine trees as the cliff edge recedes to the right. Finally, the character turns inland away from the valley, following a dirt path that leads deep into the forested terrain until the canyon disappears from view.
